---
title: "LRRK2 Progression Data Prep"
author: "Jackson G. Schumacher"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
    theme: flatly
---

<!-- Produces: LRRK2_Analysis_Ready.xlsx -->
<!-- Manuscript: Schumacher et al., Variant-specific motor symptom progression in LRRK2-associated Parkinson's disease -->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
```

```{r packages}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(openxlsx)
```

```{r config}
config <- list(
  data     = "Data/LRRK2_PPMI_Dataset.xlsx",
  ledd_csv = "Data/LEDD_Concomitant_Medication_Log_30Jun2026.csv",
  dem_csv  = "Data/Demographics_30Jun2026.csv",
  saa_csv  = "Data/SAA_Biospecimen_Analysis_Results_01Jul2026.csv",
  proc_csv = "Data/Procedure_for_PD_Log_30Jun2026.csv",
  out      = "Data/LRRK2_Analysis_Ready.xlsx"
)
if (!dir.exists("Output")) dir.create("Output")

SH <- list(
  participants = "Participants",
  updrs3 = "UPDRS_III", updrs1 = "UPDRS_I",
  updrs2 = "UPDRS_II",  updrs4 = "UPDRS_IV",
  moca   = "MoCA",      dat    = "DAT_SPECT",
  wgs    = "WGS_LRRK2"
)

COHORT_LEVELS <- c("SPD", "G2019S", "R1441G_M1646T", "M1646T")
VALID_STATUS  <- c("Enrolled", "Complete", "Withdrew", "Withdraw Deceased")
MAX_YEAR <- 12
```

```{r helpers}
parse_my <- function(s) {
  if (is.na(s) || !nzchar(trimws(s))) return(NA_integer_)
  parts <- strsplit(trimws(s), "/")[[1]]
  if (length(parts) != 2) return(NA_integer_)
  as.integer(parts[2]) * 12L + as.integer(parts[1])
}
parse_my_vec <- Vectorize(parse_my)

# per-visit LEDD: strict stop boundary, COMT multipliers applied to concurrent LD
compute_visit_ledd <- function(visit_months, patnos, ledd_log) {
  log <- ledd_log %>%
    mutate(
      start_m  = parse_my_vec(STARTDT),
      stop_m   = parse_my_vec(STOPDT),
      ledd_num = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(LEDD)),
      is_mult  = grepl("^LD x", LEDD, ignore.case = TRUE),
      mult_val = ifelse(is_mult,
                        suppressWarnings(as.numeric(sub("LD x\\s*", "", LEDD))),
                        NA_real_),
      trt_up   = toupper(LEDTRT),
      is_ld    = grepl(paste0("LEVODOPA|SINEMET|CARBIDOPA|STALEVO|MADOPAR|",
                              "DUOPA|DUODOPA|RYTARY|INBRIJA|CORBILTA"), trt_up)
    )

  out <- numeric(length(visit_months))
  for (i in seq_along(visit_months)) {
    vm  <- visit_months[i]
    pid <- as.character(patnos[i])
    if (is.na(vm)) { out[i] <- NA_real_; next }

    act <- log %>%
      filter(PATNO == pid, !is.na(start_m),
             start_m <= vm, is.na(stop_m) | stop_m > vm)

    dir   <- act %>% filter(!is.na(ledd_num), !is_mult)
    mults <- act %>% filter(is_mult, !is.na(mult_val))

    d_total  <- sum(dir$ledd_num, na.rm = TRUE)
    ld_total <- sum(dir$ledd_num[dir$is_ld], na.rm = TRUE)
    m_sum    <- sum(mults$mult_val, na.rm = TRUE)

    out[i] <- d_total + ld_total * m_sum
  }
  round(out, 1)
}

compute_subscores <- function(df) {
  df %>% mutate(
    tremor_score = rowSums(select(., NP3PTRMR, NP3PTRML, NP3KTRMR, NP3KTRML,
                                   NP3RTARU, NP3RTALU, NP3RTARL, NP3RTALL,
                                   NP3RTALJ, NP3RTCON), na.rm = FALSE),
    rigidity_score = rowSums(select(., NP3RIGN, NP3RIGRU, NP3RIGLU,
                                     NP3RIGRL, NP3RIGLL), na.rm = FALSE),
    bradykinesia_score = rowSums(select(., NP3FTAPR, NP3FTAPL, NP3HMOVR,
                                         NP3HMOVL, NP3PRSPR, NP3PRSPL,
                                         NP3TTAPR, NP3TTAPL, NP3LGAGR,
                                         NP3LGAGL, NP3RISNG, NP3BRADY),
                                 na.rm = FALSE),
    axial_score = rowSums(select(., NP3GAIT, NP3FRZGT, NP3PSTBL, NP3POSTR),
                          na.rm = FALSE),
    bulbar_score = rowSums(select(., NP3SPCH, NP3FACXP), na.rm = FALSE),
    pigd_score = rowSums(select(., NP3GAIT, NP3FRZGT, NP3PSTBL), na.rm = FALSE)
  )
}
```

## Participants

```{r participants}
dem_raw <- read_excel(config$data, sheet = SH$participants)
dem_raw$PATNO <- as.character(dem_raw$PATNO)

flow <- list()
flow$total <- nrow(dem_raw)

dem <- dem_raw %>% filter(Enrollment_Status %in% VALID_STATUS)
flow$valid_status <- nrow(dem)

# SWEDD excluded; phenoconversion only from Prodromal
dem <- dem %>%
  filter(PPMI_Cohort == "Parkinson's Disease" |
         (Phenoconverted == 1 & PPMI_Cohort == "Prodromal"))
flow$pd <- nrow(dem)

dem <- dem %>% filter(Has_WGS == 1)
flow$has_wgs <- nrow(dem)

# WGS variant profiles drive LRRK2 cohort assignment
wgs_detail <- read_excel(config$data, sheet = SH$wgs)
wgs_detail$PATNO <- sub("^PP-", "", as.character(wgs_detail$PATNO))

wgs_profile <- wgs_detail %>%
  group_by(PATNO) %>%
  summarise(
    has_G2019S = any(LRRK2_Variant == "G2019S"),
    has_R1441G = any(LRRK2_Variant == "R1441G"),
    has_R1441C = any(LRRK2_Variant == "R1441C"),
    has_M1646T = any(LRRK2_Variant == "M1646T"),
    G2019S_dosage = max(as.numeric(Dosage[LRRK2_Variant == "G2019S"]), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
wgs_profile$G2019S_dosage[is.infinite(wgs_profile$G2019S_dosage)] <- NA

dem <- dem %>%
  left_join(wgs_profile, by = "PATNO") %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("has_"), ~ replace_na(., FALSE)))

excl_genes <- c("Consensus_GBA", "Consensus_SNCA", "Consensus_PRKN",
                "Consensus_PINK1", "Consensus_PARK7", "Consensus_VPS35")
dem$has_excl <- rowSums(
  sapply(excl_genes, function(col) {
    dem[[col]] != "0" & dem[[col]] != "NA" & !is.na(dem[[col]])
  })
) > 0
flow$excl_other_gene <- sum(dem$has_excl)
dem <- dem %>% filter(!has_excl) %>% select(-has_excl)
flow$after_gene_excl <- nrow(dem)

# WGS-first; consensus supplements carriers absent from WGS caller output
dem <- dem %>%
  mutate(
    G2019S_homozygous = (has_G2019S & !is.na(G2019S_dosage) & G2019S_dosage == 2) |
                         Consensus_LRRK2 == "G2019S/G2019S",
    Cohort = case_when(
      has_G2019S ~ "G2019S",
      has_R1441G & has_M1646T ~ "R1441G_M1646T",
      has_R1441C & !has_M1646T ~ NA_character_,
      has_M1646T ~ "M1646T",
      Consensus_LRRK2 %in% c("G2019S", "G2019S/G2019S") ~ "G2019S",
      Consensus_LRRK2 %in% c("R1441G") ~ "R1441G_M1646T",
      Consensus_LRRK2 != "0" & !is.na(Consensus_LRRK2) &
        Consensus_LRRK2 != "NA" ~ NA_character_,
      TRUE ~ "SPD"
    ),
    Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = COHORT_LEVELS),
    Sex    = factor(Sex, levels = c("Female", "Male")),
    Race   = factor(if_else(Race == "White", "White", "Other"),
                    levels = c("White", "Other"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Cohort))
flow$final <- nrow(dem)

# ENROLL_AGE is age at cohort entry. For prodromal phenoconverters, entry is years
# before PD baseline, so it is not their age at PD baseline. Anchor on the first
# recorded visit, which is the point ENROLL_AGE refers to.
entry_lookup <- read_excel(config$data, sheet = SH$updrs3) %>%
  mutate(PATNO = as.character(PATNO), v_month = parse_my_vec(INFODT)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(v_month)) %>%
  group_by(PATNO) %>%
  summarise(entry_month = min(v_month), .groups = "drop")

dem <- dem %>%
  left_join(entry_lookup, by = "PATNO") %>%
  mutate(
    bl_month    = parse_my_vec(PD_Baseline_Date),
    sx_month    = parse_my_vec(Symptom_Onset_Date),
    dx_month    = parse_my_vec(PD_Diagnosis_Date),
    onset_month = coalesce(sx_month, dx_month),

    # age at PD baseline, carried forward from cohort entry. For enrolled PD these
    # coincide; for phenoconverters PD baseline is the conversion date, years later.
    Age_baseline = if_else(!is.na(entry_month) & !is.na(bl_month),
                           as.numeric(ENROLL_AGE) + (bl_month - entry_month) / 12,
                           as.numeric(ENROLL_AGE)),

    # Phenoconverters carry no onset or diagnosis date because PD_Baseline_Date IS the
    # conversion date: duration at PD baseline is zero by construction, not missing.
    # Checked first, so the one phenoconverter who does have an onset date is treated
    # like the other 55 rather than picking up a prodromal-symptom duration.
    Duration_bl = case_when(
      Phenoconverted == 1 & !is.na(bl_month) ~ 0,
      !is.na(onset_month) & !is.na(bl_month) ~ (bl_month - onset_month) / 12,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # onset = age at PD baseline - duration. No ENROLL_AGE fallback: previously that
    # silently assigned age at entry, which for phenoconverters understates onset age
    # by the prodromal interval and implies a duration of zero without saying so.
    # Both terms are in the models, and onset does not proxy duration: they are two
    # dimensions of one identity, and duration differs 2.4-fold across cohorts
    # (SPD 1.8y vs G2019S 4.3y) because the Genetic Registry does not recruit de novo.
    Age_onset = Age_baseline - Duration_bl
  )

cat(sprintf("\nPhenoconverters (Duration_bl set to 0): %d\n",
            sum(dem$Phenoconverted == 1 & !is.na(dem$Duration_bl))))
cat(sprintf("Dropped, no date and not a phenoconverter: %d\n",
            sum(is.na(dem$Duration_bl))))

cat("\nBaseline disease duration by cohort (years):\n")
print(dem %>% group_by(Cohort) %>%
        summarise(N = n(), mean = round(mean(Duration_bl, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
                  sd = round(sd(Duration_bl, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
                  median = round(median(Duration_bl, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
                  missing = sum(is.na(Duration_bl)), .groups = "drop") %>%
        as.data.frame())

# the ENROLL_AGE fallback understated onset age for phenoconverters by the prodromal
# interval; this shows how far, and should be zero for enrolled PD
cat("\nAge at PD baseline vs age at cohort entry (years):\n")
print(dem %>%
        mutate(entry_to_bl = Age_baseline - as.numeric(ENROLL_AGE)) %>%
        group_by(Cohort, Phenoconverted) %>%
        summarise(N = n(), mean_gap = round(mean(entry_to_bl, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
                  max_gap = round(max(entry_to_bl, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
                  .groups = "drop") %>%
        as.data.frame())

cat("Exclusion flow:\n")
cat(sprintf("  All participants:       %d\n", flow$total))
cat(sprintf("  Valid enrollment:       %d\n", flow$valid_status))
cat(sprintf("  PD (enrolled + pheno):  %d\n", flow$pd))
cat(sprintf("  With public WGS:       %d\n", flow$has_wgs))
cat(sprintf("  Excluded other genes:   %d\n", flow$excl_other_gene))
cat(sprintf("  After gene exclusions:  %d\n", flow$after_gene_excl))
cat(sprintf("  Final (4-group):        %d\n", flow$final))
table(dem$Cohort, useNA = "ifany")
```

## Participant-Level Variables

```{r table1-vars}
# original race from raw demographics (pre-collapse for Table 1)
dem_detail <- read.csv(config$dem_csv)
dem_detail$PATNO <- as.character(dem_detail$PATNO)
dem_detail <- dem_detail %>%
  group_by(PATNO) %>% slice(1) %>% ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    Race_detail = case_when(
      RAWHITE == 1 & rowSums(cbind(RAASIAN, RABLACK, RAHAWOPI, RAINDALS), na.rm = TRUE) == 0 ~ "White",
      RABLACK == 1 & rowSums(cbind(RAWHITE, RAASIAN, RAHAWOPI, RAINDALS), na.rm = TRUE) == 0 ~ "Black",
      RAASIAN == 1 & rowSums(cbind(RAWHITE, RABLACK, RAHAWOPI, RAINDALS), na.rm = TRUE) == 0 ~ "Asian",
      rowSums(cbind(RAWHITE, RABLACK, RAASIAN, RAHAWOPI, RAINDALS), na.rm = TRUE) > 1 ~ "Multiracial",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(PATNO, Race_detail)
dem <- dem %>% left_join(dem_detail, by = "PATNO")

# SAA: prioritize BL, collapse Inconclusive → Unknown
saa <- read.csv(config$saa_csv)
saa$PATNO <- as.character(saa$PATNO)
saa_bl <- saa %>% filter(CLINICAL_EVENT == "BL") %>%
  group_by(PATNO) %>% slice(1) %>% ungroup() %>%
  select(PATNO, SAA = SAA_Status)
saa_any <- saa %>% group_by(PATNO) %>% slice(1) %>% ungroup() %>%
  select(PATNO, SAA = SAA_Status)
saa_per_pat <- saa_bl %>%
  bind_rows(saa_any %>% filter(!PATNO %in% saa_bl$PATNO)) %>%
  mutate(SAA = if_else(SAA == "Inconclusive", "Unknown", SAA))
dem <- dem %>% left_join(saa_per_pat, by = "PATNO") %>%
  mutate(SAA = if_else(is.na(SAA), "Unknown", SAA))

# DBS
proc <- read.csv(config$proc_csv)
proc$PATNO <- as.character(proc$PATNO)
dbs_pats <- unique(proc$PATNO[proc$PDSURGTP == 1])
dem$DBS <- dem$PATNO %in% dbs_pats
```

## Clinical Outcomes

```{r shared-prep}
VALID_IDS <- dem$PATNO
pheno_ids <- dem$PATNO[dem$Phenoconverted == 1]
bl_lookup <- dem %>% select(PATNO, bl_month)
dem_cols  <- c("PATNO", "Cohort", "Age_onset", "Age_baseline", "Duration_bl",
               "Sex", "Race", "G2019S_homozygous", "Phenoconverted", "has_M1646T")

ledd_log <- read.csv(config$ledd_csv)
ledd_log$PATNO <- as.character(ledd_log$PATNO)

prep_visits <- function(df) {
  df$PATNO <- as.character(df$PATNO)
  df %>%
    filter(PATNO %in% VALID_IDS) %>%
    mutate(visit_month = parse_my_vec(INFODT)) %>%
    left_join(bl_lookup, by = "PATNO") %>%
    mutate(
      visit_year = if_else(
        PATNO %in% pheno_ids & !is.na(visit_month) & !is.na(bl_month),
        (visit_month - bl_month) / 12,
        visit_year
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(visit_year >= 0, visit_year <= MAX_YEAR) %>%
    select(-bl_month)
}

merge_dem <- function(df, score_col) {
  df %>%
    left_join(dem %>% select(all_of(dem_cols)), by = "PATNO") %>%
    filter(!is.na(Cohort)) %>%
    rename(participant_id = PATNO, score = !!sym(score_col)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    mutate(baseline_score = first(score, order_by = visit_year)) %>%
    ungroup()
}
```

```{r updrs3}
u3_raw <- read_excel(config$data, sheet = SH$updrs3)
u3_raw <- prep_visits(u3_raw)
u3_raw$LEDD <- compute_visit_ledd(u3_raw$visit_month, u3_raw$PATNO, ledd_log)

item3_cols <- c("NP3SPCH", "NP3FACXP", "NP3RIGN", "NP3RIGRU", "NP3RIGLU",
                "NP3RIGRL", "NP3RIGLL", "NP3FTAPR", "NP3FTAPL", "NP3HMOVR",
                "NP3HMOVL", "NP3PRSPR", "NP3PRSPL", "NP3TTAPR", "NP3TTAPL",
                "NP3LGAGR", "NP3LGAGL", "NP3RISNG", "NP3GAIT", "NP3FRZGT",
                "NP3PSTBL", "NP3POSTR", "NP3BRADY", "NP3PTRMR", "NP3PTRML",
                "NP3KTRMR", "NP3KTRML", "NP3RTARU", "NP3RTALU", "NP3RTARL",
                "NP3RTALL", "NP3RTALJ", "NP3RTCON")
for (col in item3_cols)
  if (col %in% names(u3_raw)) u3_raw[[col]] <- as.numeric(u3_raw[[col]])
u3_raw <- compute_subscores(u3_raw)

u3_off <- u3_raw %>%
  filter(PDTRTMNT == "0" | is.na(PDTRTMNT) | PDSTATE == "OFF" | PAG_NAME == "NUPDR3OF") %>%
  filter(PDSTATE != "ON" | is.na(PDSTATE)) %>%
  filter(!PAG_NAME %in% c("NUPDR3ON", "NUPDRS3A"))

d_u3_off <- merge_dem(u3_off, "NP3TOT")

cat(sprintf("UPDRS III OFF: %d obs, %d participants\n",
            nrow(d_u3_off), n_distinct(d_u3_off$participant_id)))
```

```{r other-outcomes}
u1_raw <- read_excel(config$data, sheet = SH$updrs1)
u1_raw <- prep_visits(u1_raw)
d_u1 <- merge_dem(u1_raw, "NP1TOT")

u2_raw <- read_excel(config$data, sheet = SH$updrs2)
u2_raw <- prep_visits(u2_raw)
item2_cols <- c("NP2SPCH", "NP2SALV", "NP2SWAL", "NP2EAT", "NP2DRES",
                "NP2HYGN", "NP2HWRT", "NP2HOBB", "NP2TURN", "NP2TRMR",
                "NP2RISE", "NP2WALK", "NP2FREZ")
for (col in item2_cols)
  if (col %in% names(u2_raw)) u2_raw[[col]] <- as.numeric(u2_raw[[col]])
d_u2 <- merge_dem(u2_raw, "NP2PTOT")

u4_raw <- read_excel(config$data, sheet = SH$updrs4)
u4_raw <- prep_visits(u4_raw)
d_u4 <- merge_dem(u4_raw, "NP4TOT")

moca_raw <- read_excel(config$data, sheet = SH$moca)
moca_raw <- prep_visits(moca_raw)
moca_col <- intersect(c("MCATOT", "MoCA_score"), names(moca_raw))[1]
moca_raw[[moca_col]] <- as.numeric(moca_raw[[moca_col]])
d_moca <- merge_dem(moca_raw, moca_col)

dat_raw <- read_excel(config$data, sheet = SH$dat)
dat_raw$PATNO <- as.character(dat_raw$PATNO)
dat_raw <- dat_raw %>% filter(PATNO %in% VALID_IDS)
if (!"INFODT" %in% names(dat_raw) && "DATSCAN_DATE" %in% names(dat_raw))
  dat_raw$INFODT <- dat_raw$DATSCAN_DATE
dat_raw <- dat_raw %>%
  mutate(visit_month = parse_my_vec(INFODT)) %>%
  left_join(bl_lookup, by = "PATNO") %>%
  mutate(visit_year = if_else(
    PATNO %in% pheno_ids & !is.na(visit_month) & !is.na(bl_month),
    (visit_month - bl_month) / 12, visit_year)) %>%
  filter(visit_year >= 0, visit_year <= MAX_YEAR) %>% select(-bl_month)
caudate_mean <- grep("_i$|_c$", grep("caudate", names(dat_raw), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE),
                     value = TRUE, invert = TRUE)
putamen_mean <- grep("_i$|_c$", grep("putamen", names(dat_raw), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE),
                     value = TRUE, invert = TRUE)
for (col in c(caudate_mean, putamen_mean)) dat_raw[[col]] <- as.numeric(dat_raw[[col]])
make_dat <- function(col) {
  dat_raw %>%
    left_join(dem %>% select(all_of(dem_cols)), by = "PATNO") %>%
    filter(!is.na(Cohort)) %>%
    rename(participant_id = PATNO, score = !!sym(col)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(score)) %>%
    group_by(participant_id) %>%
    mutate(baseline_score = first(score, order_by = visit_year)) %>%
    ungroup()
}
d_dat_c <- if (length(caudate_mean)) make_dat(caudate_mean[1]) else NULL
d_dat_p <- if (length(putamen_mean)) make_dat(putamen_mean[1]) else NULL

cat(sprintf("UPDRS I:  %d obs, %d participants\n", nrow(d_u1), n_distinct(d_u1$participant_id)))
cat(sprintf("UPDRS II: %d obs, %d participants\n", nrow(d_u2), n_distinct(d_u2$participant_id)))
cat(sprintf("UPDRS IV: %d obs, %d participants\n", nrow(d_u4), n_distinct(d_u4$participant_id)))
cat(sprintf("MoCA:     %d obs, %d participants\n", nrow(d_moca), n_distinct(d_moca$participant_id)))
if (!is.null(d_dat_c))
  cat(sprintf("DAT Cau:  %d obs, %d participants\n", nrow(d_dat_c), n_distinct(d_dat_c$participant_id)))
if (!is.null(d_dat_p))
  cat(sprintf("DAT Put:  %d obs, %d participants\n", nrow(d_dat_p), n_distinct(d_dat_p$participant_id)))
```

## TD/PIGD Classification

```{r td-pigd}
bl_u3 <- d_u3_off %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  slice_min(visit_year, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()
bl_u2 <- u2_raw %>%
  group_by(PATNO) %>%
  slice_min(visit_year, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

td_items <- c("NP2TRMR", "NP3PTRMR", "NP3PTRML", "NP3KTRMR", "NP3KTRML",
              "NP3RTARU", "NP3RTALU", "NP3RTARL", "NP3RTALL", "NP3RTALJ", "NP3RTCON")
pigd_items_u2 <- c("NP2WALK", "NP2FREZ")
pigd_items_u3 <- c("NP3GAIT", "NP3FRZGT", "NP3PSTBL")

td_pigd <- bl_u3 %>%
  select(participant_id, any_of(c(td_items, pigd_items_u3))) %>%
  left_join(
    bl_u2 %>% select(PATNO, any_of(c("NP2TRMR", pigd_items_u2))) %>%
      rename(participant_id = PATNO),
    by = "participant_id"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    td_mean   = mean(c_across(any_of(td_items)), na.rm = FALSE),
    pigd_mean = mean(c_across(any_of(c(pigd_items_u2, pigd_items_u3))), na.rm = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    td_pigd_ratio = if_else(pigd_mean == 0 & td_mean == 0, NA_real_,
                   if_else(pigd_mean == 0, Inf, td_mean / pigd_mean)),
    motor_subtype = case_when(
      is.na(td_pigd_ratio) ~ "Indeterminate",
      td_pigd_ratio >= 1.15 ~ "TD",
      td_pigd_ratio <= 0.90 ~ "PIGD",
      TRUE ~ "Indeterminate"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(participant_id, td_mean, pigd_mean, td_pigd_ratio, motor_subtype)
table(td_pigd$motor_subtype)
```

## Output

```{r output}
dem_out <- dem %>%
  left_join(td_pigd %>% select(participant_id, motor_subtype),
            by = c("PATNO" = "participant_id")) %>%
  select(PATNO, Cohort, Sex, Race, Race_detail, Age_onset, Age_baseline, Duration_bl,
         G2019S_homozygous, Phenoconverted, has_M1646T,
         has_G2019S, has_R1441G, has_R1441C,
         motor_subtype, SAA, DBS, Consensus_LRRK2,
         PPMI_Cohort, Enrollment_Status,
         PD_Baseline_Date, Symptom_Onset_Date, PD_Diagnosis_Date)

keep_u3 <- c("participant_id", "EVENT_ID", "INFODT", "visit_year", "visit_month",
             "PAG_NAME", "PDSTATE", "PDTRTMNT",
             "score", "baseline_score", "LEDD",
             "Cohort", "Age_onset", "Duration_bl", "Sex", "Race",
             "G2019S_homozygous", "Phenoconverted", "has_M1646T",
             "tremor_score", "rigidity_score", "bradykinesia_score",
             "axial_score", "bulbar_score", "pigd_score",
             item3_cols)
keep_u3 <- keep_u3[keep_u3 %in% names(d_u3_off)]
keep_other <- c("participant_id", "EVENT_ID", "INFODT", "visit_year",
                "score", "baseline_score", "Cohort", "Age_onset", "Duration_bl",
                "Sex", "Race")

wb <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb, "Participants");       writeData(wb, "Participants", dem_out)
addWorksheet(wb, "UPDRS_III_OFF");      writeData(wb, "UPDRS_III_OFF", d_u3_off %>% select(any_of(keep_u3)))
addWorksheet(wb, "UPDRS_I");            writeData(wb, "UPDRS_I", d_u1 %>% select(any_of(keep_other)))
addWorksheet(wb, "UPDRS_II");           writeData(wb, "UPDRS_II", d_u2 %>% select(any_of(keep_other)))
addWorksheet(wb, "UPDRS_IV");           writeData(wb, "UPDRS_IV", d_u4 %>% select(any_of(keep_other)))
addWorksheet(wb, "MoCA");              writeData(wb, "MoCA", d_moca %>% select(any_of(keep_other)))
if (!is.null(d_dat_c)) { addWorksheet(wb, "DAT_Caudate"); writeData(wb, "DAT_Caudate", d_dat_c %>% select(any_of(keep_other))) }
if (!is.null(d_dat_p)) { addWorksheet(wb, "DAT_Putamen"); writeData(wb, "DAT_Putamen", d_dat_p %>% select(any_of(keep_other))) }
addWorksheet(wb, "TD_PIGD");           writeData(wb, "TD_PIGD", td_pigd)
saveWorkbook(wb, config$out, overwrite = TRUE)
cat(sprintf("Saved: %s\n", config$out))
```

## Summary

```{r summary}
cat("Exclusion flow:\n")
cat(sprintf("  All participants:       %d\n", flow$total))
cat(sprintf("  Valid enrollment:       %d\n", flow$valid_status))
cat(sprintf("  PD (enrolled + pheno):  %d\n", flow$pd))
cat(sprintf("  With public WGS:       %d\n", flow$has_wgs))
cat(sprintf("  Excluded other genes:   %d\n", flow$excl_other_gene))
cat(sprintf("  After gene exclusions:  %d\n", flow$after_gene_excl))
cat(sprintf("  Final (4-group):        %d\n", flow$final))
table(dem$Cohort, useNA = "ifany")
```

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
